summary: Phase 4 Payouts fully tested. All 15 backend tests pass. All 9 frontend UI checks pass. Payout flow works correctly in dev mode: request → confirmation modal → completed → history updated → transaction ledger updated.

backend: POST /api/wallet/payout succeeds when conditions met (dev mode, returns completed)
POST /api/wallet/payout fails when available_balance insufficient (400 error)
POST /api/wallet/payout fails when amount < MINIMUM_PAYOUT_CENTS 500 (400 error)
POST /api/wallet/payout fails when stripe_connect_status != active (400 error)
POST /api/wallet/payout is idempotent (rejects when balance is 0 after first payout)
POST /api/wallet/payout debits wallet atomically (available_balance decremented, total_withdrawn incremented)
POST /api/wallet/payout creates debit_payout transaction in ledger
POST /api/wallet/payout in dev mode marks payout as completed immediately with tr_dev_ prefix
GET /api/wallet/payouts returns payout history with correct structure
GET /api/wallet/payouts/:id returns 404 for non-existent payout (access control)
Webhook handler handle_transfer_paid marks payout as completed
Webhook handler handle_transfer_failed re-credits wallet and marks payout as failed
Webhook handlers are idempotent (skip already processed payouts)
Full payout flow end-to-end: request → completed → history → ledger
frontend: Wallet page loads with balance cards (EN ATTENTE, DISPONIBLE, RETIRABLE)
Payout button visible when can_payout=true (balance >= 500c and connect active)
Payout button shows 'Retirer vers mon compte' text
Payout confirmation modal appears on button click
Confirmation modal shows amount (25,00 €) and irreversibility warning
Confirm button triggers payout API call
After payout: payout button hidden (shows 'Min. 5,00 € pour retirer')
Payout history section shows completed payout with 'Effectué' status and 'DEV' tag

webhook_handlers.transfer.failed: re-credits wallet, marks payout as failed (idempotent)

seed_data_creation: Reset wallet to available_balance=2500, deleted existing payouts and payout transactions before testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Payouts fully implemented and tested. Key components: (1) POST /api/wallet/payout validates conditions (balance, minimum 500c, connect active, no pending payout) then creates payout record. (2) Dev mode (acct_dev_* accounts) completes immediately with tr_dev_ prefix. (3) Real mode creates Stripe Transfer, debits wallet atomically, sets status to 'processing'. (4) Webhook handlers: transfer.paid → completed, transfer.failed → re-credit wallet + failed. (5) Frontend: WalletPage.js shows payout button when can_payout=true, confirmation modal, PayoutHistory section, debit_payout in TransactionHistory. (6) data-testid attributes: payout-btn, payout-confirm-modal, payout-confirm-btn, payout-history, payout-{id}. (7) MOCKED: Stripe Transfer is simulated in dev mode for acct_dev_* accounts.

mocked_apis_list: Stripe Transfer create (dev mode for acct_dev_* accounts)
Stripe Balance retrieve (skipped for dev accounts)
